title: ICAI Announces Webinar on Bridging the Mindset Gap: The CA Practice OS
content:
# ICAI Announces Webinar on Bridging the Mindset Gap: The CA Practice OS

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne professional excellence enhance karne ke liye ek insightful webinar announce kiya hai.

This webinar, titled "Bridging the Mindset Gap: The CA Practice OS: Reprogramming Value, Behaviour and Attitude for Scale & Behavioural and Interpersonal Competencies," CAs ko future-ready banane par focused hai.

*   **Webinar Focus:** This initiative aims at enabling Chartered Accountants to align with evolving technological advancements, fostering a future-ready mindset, and building resilient practices. It will cover reprogramming value, behavior, and attitude for scale, along with behavioral and interpersonal competencies.
*   **Key Themes:** The sessions are designed to go beyond technical excellence, focusing on the essential soft infrastructure of professional success like attitude, ethics, and values. Participants will gain insights on adapting to rapid digital transformation and enhancing their readiness for future challenges.
*   **Date & Time:** The webinar is scheduled for **June 8, 2026**, from 4:00 PM to 6:00 PM (IST).

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://live.icai.org/cmp/08062026/)

*Published on: 8 June 2026*
